title: Fatat el-Istiradh
overview: A group of stage actors who hate Ahmed Aluwi, the rich young man, starts attacking him in the magazines; when Ahemd knows about that, he decides to check the situation himself and he falls in love with one the actress over there; he pretends to be a poor simple actor, just to be near her; she starts responding to him without knowing his true identity.

trailers.title: الصدفة هتخلي حسن يوسف بطل قدام سعاد حسني
